rationale: Downstream contract is coherent. The workflow result is intentionally the spec-110 CLI surface: verify plus tally stdout passed through verbatim, so L5/surviving skills consume the same decision preview, recovery lines, per-slot table, aggregate, and mechanical changes union as the skills path. The plan keeps semantic consolidation and merge authority in ms-panel-tally/mindspec complete, avoiding a second decision authority. Degraded modes are covered: codex quota wall becomes claude-sub or MISSING per config, parse failure cannot substitute, external is stubbed, and workflow-absent hosts fall back to the skills path. Runner selection uses the validated spec-109 runner enum with claude-code-skills default, preserving stable dispatch.
